zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Crofts Esquire於1540年6月12日出生在英國素福爾可韋斯特 斯托福時，他的父親Edmund Croftes21歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Kitson17歲。他於1561年與Susan Poley在英國素福爾可蕾托 薩可哈姆結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1612年4月3日在英國素福爾可蕾托 薩可哈姆享年71歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可韋斯特 斯托福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Crofts Esquire于1540年6月12日出生在英国素福爾可韋斯特 斯托福时，他的父亲Edmund Croftes21岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Kitson17岁。他于1561年与Susan Poley在英国素福爾可蕾托 薩可哈姆结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1612年4月3日在英国素福爾可蕾托 薩可哈姆享年71岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可韋斯特 斯托福。

nameMeanings.name: Crofts
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Croft , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Croft
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places, for example in Lincolnshire, Lancashire, Herefordshire, and North Yorkshire, all named with Old English croft ‘small arable enclosure (normally adjoining a house)’, or a topographic name for someone who lived by a croft, from Middle English croft.
English: possibly in some cases a variant of   Craft   2.
Americanized form of German, Danish, Swedish, or Jewish   Kraft  . Compare   Kroft   and   Craft  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Crofts Esquire was born on 12 June 1540, in West Stow, Suffolk, England, his father, Edmund Croftes, was 21 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Kitson, was 17. He married Susan Poley in 1561, in Little Saxham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 3 April 1612, in Little Saxham, Suffolk, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in West Stow, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Crofts Esquire est né le 12 juin 1540, à West Stow, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Croftes, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Kitson, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Susan Poley en 1561, à Little Saxham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 3 avril 1612, à Little Saxham, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à West Stow, Suffolk, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Crofts Esquire è nato il il 12 giugno 1540 nel West Stow, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Edmund Croftes, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Kitson, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Susan Poley nel 1561, nel Little Saxham, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 3 aprile 1612, nel Little Saxham, Suffolk, England, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a West Stow, Suffolk, England.

ja.St. James', Great Grimsby, Lincoln, Engl: イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアグレアト グリムスビー スト マリー アンド スト ジャムス
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Crofts Esquireが1540年6月12日にイギリススフォルクウエスト ストウで生まれた時，父Edmund Croftesは21歳，母Lady Elizabeth Kitsonは17歳であった。1561年にイギリススフォルクリットル サクスハムでSusan Poleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1612年4月3日にイギリススフォルクリットル サクスハムで71歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクウエスト ストウにて埋葬された。

ko.St. James', Great Grimsby, Lincoln, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 그리트 그림스비 스트 메리 앤드 스트 자메스
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Crofts Esquire(이)가 1540년 6월 12일 영국 수폴크 웨스트 스타우에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund Croftes(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Kitson(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1561년 영국 수폴크 리틀 사스함에서 Susan Poley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1612년 4월 3일 영국 수폴크 리틀 사스함에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 웨스트 스타우에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Crofts Esquire nasceu em 12 de junho de 1540, em West Stow, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Croftes, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Kitson, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Susan Poley em 1561, em Little Saxham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de abril de 1612, em Little Saxham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em West Stow, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.St. James', Great Grimsby, Lincoln, Engl: грит гримсби ст мэри анд ст джемесь, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Crofts Esquire родился 12 июня 1540 г. в местности вест стоу, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Edmund Croftes было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Kitson, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Susan Poley в 1561 г. в местности литл саксхам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 3 апреля 1612 г. в местности литл саксхам, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности вест стоу, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Crofts Esquire nació el 12 de junio de 1540, en West Stow, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund Croftes, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Kitson, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Susan Poley en 1561, en Little Saxham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 3 de abril de 1612, en Little Saxham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en West Stow, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
